pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

Thank you, Jacob. Next slide, please. In 2024, we delivered 26% sales growth and 26% operating profit growth. I would like to start this call by going through the performance highlights across our strategic aspirations before handing over the word to my colleagues.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你，Jacob。请翻到下一张幻灯片。2024年，我们实现了26%的销售增长和26%的营业利润增长。在将发言权交给我的同事之前，我想先回顾一下我们在战略愿景方面的业绩亮点。

原文：Thank you, Jacob. Next slide, please. In 2024, we delivered 26% sales growth and 26% operating profit growth. I would like to start this call by going through the performance highlights across our strategic aspirations before handing over the word to my colleagues.

pairs.en: Starting with our focus on purpose and sustainability, we are now serving more than 45 million patients with our diabetes and obesity treatments. This is an increase of almost 4 million patients compared to last year and reflects our continued capacity expansion efforts. Our total carbon emissions rose by 23% compared to 2023. This was mainly driven by our increased production volumes and increased investments in capital expenditure to meet the high demand for our innovative treatments.
pairs.zh:
从我们对目标和可持续性的关注开始，我们现在为超过45 million患者提供我们的diabetes and obesity treatments。这比去年增加了近4 million患者，反映了我们持续扩大产能的努力。我们的总碳排放量相比2023年增加了23%。这主要是由于我们增加了产量并增加了资本支出投资，以满足对我们innovative treatments的高需求。

Starting with our focus on purpose and sustainability, we are now serving more than 45 million patients with our diabetes and obesity treatments. This is an increase of almost 4 million patients compared to last year and reflects our continued capacity expansion efforts. Our total carbon emissions rose by 23% compared to 2023. This was mainly driven by our increased production volumes and increased investments in capital expenditure to meet the high demand for our innovative treatments.

pairs.en: To uphold our commitment of being a sustainable employer, we expanded the number of women in senior leadership positions to 42%, compared to around 41% last year. In R&D, we have -- we had several exciting obesity readouts this quarter, such as CagriSema, semaglutide 7.2 milligrams, and amycretin. These results reinforce our strategic aspiration of developing superior treatment solutions for people living with obesity. For CagriSema, we remain confident in its potent biology and look forward to further exploring its potential and to making it available to patients.
pairs.zh:
为了履行我们作为可持续雇主的承诺，我们将高级领导职位中的女性比例提升至42%，而去年约为41%。在研发领域，本季度我们取得了多项令人振奋的肥胖症研究进展，例如CagriSema、semaglutide 7.2毫克和amycretin。这些结果强化了我们的战略愿景，即为肥胖患者开发卓越的治疗方案。对于CagriSema，我们对其强大的生物学机制充满信心，并期待进一步探索其潜力，最终将其提供给患者。

To uphold our commitment of being a sustainable employer, we expanded the number of women in senior leadership positions to 42%, compared to around 41% last year. In R&D, we have -- we had several exciting obesity readouts this quarter, such as CagriSema, semaglutide 7.2 milligrams, and amycretin. These results reinforce our strategic aspiration of developing superior treatment solutions for people living with obesity. For CagriSema, we remain confident in its potent biology and look forward to further exploring its potential and to making it available to patients.

pairs.en: Martin will come back to this and all R&D milestones later. The quarterly sales growth reflects solid commercial execution across both operating units. Camilla and Dave will go through the details later. Karsten will go through the financial details, but I'm pleased with the sales growth of 26% in 2024, as well as attractive growth outlook for 2025.
pairs.zh:
Martin稍后将回到这一点以及所有研发里程碑。季度销售增长反映了两个运营部门稳健的商业执行。Camilla和Dave稍后会详细介绍细节。Karsten将介绍财务细节，但我对2024年26%的销售增长以及2025年有吸引力的增长前景感到满意。

Martin will come back to this and all R&D milestones later. The quarterly sales growth reflects solid commercial execution across both operating units. Camilla and Dave will go through the details later. Karsten will go through the financial details, but I'm pleased with the sales growth of 26% in 2024, as well as attractive growth outlook for 2025.

pairs.en: Now I would like to hand over the word to Camilla for an update on commercial execution of 2024.
pairs.zh:
现在我把发言权交给Camilla，请她介绍2024年的商业执行情况。

Now I would like to hand over the word to Camilla for an update on commercial execution of 2024.

pairs.en: Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs
pairs.zh:
Camilla Sylvest——执行副总裁，商业战略与公司事务

Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs

pairs.en: Thank you, Lars and please turn to the next slide. In 2024, our total sales increased by 26%. The sales growth was driven by both operating units with North America operations growing 30% and international operations growing 19%. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Lars，请翻到下一页。2024年，我们的总销售额增长了26%。销售额的增长由两个运营单位共同推动，北美业务增长30%，国际业务增长19%。在美国，销售额增长受到总净销售额调整的积极影响。

Thank you, Lars and please turn to the next slide. In 2024, our total sales increased by 26%. The sales growth was driven by both operating units with North America operations growing 30% and international operations growing 19%. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments.

pairs.en: Our GLP-1 sales in diabetes increased by 22%, driven by North America operations growing 23% and international operations growing 18%. Insulin sales increased by 17%, driven by North America operations growing 52%, positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments and international operations growing 6%. Obesity care sales increased 57%, driven by North America operations growing 45% and international operations growing 107%. In both geographies, growth was driven by Wegovy, partly offset by declining Saxenda sales as the obesity care market is moving toward once weekly treatments.
pairs.zh:
我们的GLP-1糖尿病销售额增长了22%，得益于北美业务增长23%和国际业务增长18%。胰岛素销售额增长了17%，得益于北美业务增长52%（受毛净销售额调整的积极影响）和国际业务增长6%。肥胖症护理销售额增长了57%，得益于北美业务增长45%和国际业务增长107%。在这两个地区，增长均由Wegovy推动，而Saxenda销售额的下降部分抵消了这一增长，因为肥胖症护理市场正转向每周一次的治疗方案。

Our GLP-1 sales in diabetes increased by 22%, driven by North America operations growing 23% and international operations growing 18%. Insulin sales increased by 17%, driven by North America operations growing 52%, positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments and international operations growing 6%. Obesity care sales increased 57%, driven by North America operations growing 45% and international operations growing 107%. In both geographies, growth was driven by Wegovy, partly offset by declining Saxenda sales as the obesity care market is moving toward once weekly treatments.

pairs.en: Rare disease sales increased by 9%, driven by a 20% increase in North America operations, and rare the sales -- rare disease sales in international operations remained unchanged compared to last year. Please turn to the next slide. I would like to reiterate our commitment to continue reaching more patients with our innovative treatments. Today.
pairs.zh:
罕见病销售额增长9%，受北美业务增长20%推动，而罕见病销售额——国际业务的罕见病销售额与去年持平。请翻到下一张幻灯片。我想重申我们的承诺，将继续用我们的创新疗法惠及更多患者。今天。

Rare disease sales increased by 9%, driven by a 20% increase in North America operations, and rare the sales -- rare disease sales in international operations remained unchanged compared to last year. Please turn to the next slide. I would like to reiterate our commitment to continue reaching more patients with our innovative treatments. Today.

pairs.en: Novo Nordisk is the global GLP-1 volume market leader, serving nearly two-thirds of all patients on GLP-1 treatments across diabetes and obesity. Our ongoing scaling efforts have supported an almost tripling of GLP-1 patient reach over the last three years. In December 2024, we announced that the acquisition of the Catalent sites from Nova Holdings was completed. This transaction supports our ongoing scaling efforts and will expand Novo Nordisk global fill and finish footprint from 11 to 14 sites.
pairs.zh:
Novo Nordisk 是全球 GLP-1 销量市场领导者，为近三分之二接受 GLP-1 治疗的糖尿病和肥胖症患者提供服务。过去三年间，我们持续的规模化努力使得 GLP-1 患者覆盖范围几乎翻了三倍。2024 年 12 月，我们宣布已完成从 Nova Holdings 收购 Catalent 工厂的交易。此项交易支持了我们持续的规模化努力，并将 Novo Nordisk 全球灌装及封装布局从 11 个工厂扩展至 14 个。

Novo Nordisk is the global GLP-1 volume market leader, serving nearly two-thirds of all patients on GLP-1 treatments across diabetes and obesity. Our ongoing scaling efforts have supported an almost tripling of GLP-1 patient reach over the last three years. In December 2024, we announced that the acquisition of the Catalent sites from Nova Holdings was completed. This transaction supports our ongoing scaling efforts and will expand Novo Nordisk global fill and finish footprint from 11 to 14 sites.

pairs.en: We still expect the three sites to gradually increase market supply beyond our preexisting CMO contracts to the market from 26 and allow us to reach significantly more patients in the years to come. Please turn to the next slide. Within diabetes care, sales growth was 20%, driven by our GLP-1 portfolio and insulins. We sustained our diabetes value market share leadership with an unchanged market share of 33.7% compared to last year.
pairs.zh:
我们预计这三个基地将从2026年起，在我们现有的CMO合同基础上逐步增加向市场的供应，使我们在未来几年能够惠及更多患者。请翻到下一页。在糖尿病护理领域，受GLP-1产品组合和胰岛素的推动，销售额增长20%。我们的糖尿病价值市场份额保持领先地位，与去年相比，市场份额稳定在33.7%。

We still expect the three sites to gradually increase market supply beyond our preexisting CMO contracts to the market from 26 and allow us to reach significantly more patients in the years to come. Please turn to the next slide. Within diabetes care, sales growth was 20%, driven by our GLP-1 portfolio and insulins. We sustained our diabetes value market share leadership with an unchanged market share of 33.7% compared to last year.

pairs.en: This remains above our strategic aspiration of reaching one-third of the global diabetes value market in 2025. Please turn to the next slide. In international operations, diabetes care sales increased by 12% in 2024, which was mainly driven by GLP-1 diabetes care sales growing 18%. Novo Nordisk remains the market leader in international operations with the GLP-1 diabetes value market share of almost 64%.
pairs.zh:
这一数字仍高于我们到2025年占据全球糖尿病价值市场三分之一的战略目标。请翻到下一页。在国际业务中，2024年糖尿病护理销售额增长12%，主要受GLP-1糖尿病护理销售额增长18%的推动。Novo Nordisk在国际业务中保持市场领先地位，GLP-1糖尿病价值市场份额接近64%。

This remains above our strategic aspiration of reaching one-third of the global diabetes value market in 2025. Please turn to the next slide. In international operations, diabetes care sales increased by 12% in 2024, which was mainly driven by GLP-1 diabetes care sales growing 18%. Novo Nordisk remains the market leader in international operations with the GLP-1 diabetes value market share of almost 64%.

pairs.en: And with that, I would hand over the word to Dave.
pairs.zh:
说完这个，我把发言权交给Dave。

And with that, I would hand over the word to Dave.

pairs.en: David Moore--Executive Vice President, US Operations and Global Business Development
pairs.zh:
David Moore——执行副总裁，美国运营和全球业务发展  
David Moore--Executive Vice President, US Operations and Global Business Development

pairs.en: Thank you, Camilla. Please turn to the next slide. Sales of GLP-1 diabetes care products in the U.S. increased by 24%.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Camilla。请翻到下一页。GLP-1糖尿病护理产品在美国的销售额增长了24%。

Thank you, Camilla. Please turn to the next slide. Sales of GLP-1 diabetes care products in the U.S. increased by 24%.

pairs.en: The sales increase was mainly driven by the continued uptake of Ozempic and the GLP-1 class growth. Novo Nordisk remains the market leader in the U.S. with more than 52% market share measured by total monthly prescriptions. Please turn to the next slide.
pairs.zh:
销售额增长主要得益于Ozempic的持续采用以及GLP-1类药物的增长。Novo Nordisk仍然是美国市场的领导者，按月总处方量计算，其市场份额超过52%。请翻到下一页。

The sales increase was mainly driven by the continued uptake of Ozempic and the GLP-1 class growth. Novo Nordisk remains the market leader in the U.S. with more than 52% market share measured by total monthly prescriptions. Please turn to the next slide.

pairs.en: Wegovy sales increased by 86% globally, driven by a 59% growth in North America operations, and Wegovy sales in international operations have reached more than DKK 11 billion. The global total branded obesity market more than doubled with a growth rate of 119%. In the U.S., the Wegovy sales growth was driven by increased volumes, partially countered by lower realized prices in the U.S. The positive volume development was also reflected in the Wegovy prescription trends in the U.S., which currently is around 200,000 weekly prescriptions.
pairs.zh:
Wegovy全球销售额增长了86%，其中北美业务增长了59%，而国际业务的Wegovy销售额已达到超过110亿丹麦克朗。全球整体品牌肥胖症市场翻了一番以上，增长率达119%。在美国，Wegovy的销售增长受销量增加推动，但部分被美国较低的实现价格所抵消。积极的销量发展也反映在美国的Wegovy处方趋势上，目前每周处方量约为20万份。

Wegovy sales increased by 86% globally, driven by a 59% growth in North America operations, and Wegovy sales in international operations have reached more than DKK 11 billion. The global total branded obesity market more than doubled with a growth rate of 119%. In the U.S., the Wegovy sales growth was driven by increased volumes, partially countered by lower realized prices in the U.S. The positive volume development was also reflected in the Wegovy prescription trends in the U.S., which currently is around 200,000 weekly prescriptions.

pairs.en: That's compared to around 100,000 weekly prescriptions in January 2024. We have reached broad formulary access for Wegovy in the U.S. and continue to work on expanding it further. Currently, Wegovy has coverage for around 55 million people living with obesity in the United States.
pairs.zh:
相比之下，2024年1月每周约10万张处方。我们已在美国为Wegovy实现了广泛的处方集覆盖，并正继续努力进一步扩大。目前，Wegovy覆盖了美国约5500万肥胖人群。

That's compared to around 100,000 weekly prescriptions in January 2024. We have reached broad formulary access for Wegovy in the U.S. and continue to work on expanding it further. Currently, Wegovy has coverage for around 55 million people living with obesity in the United States.

pairs.en: In international operations, Wegovy has now been launched in more than 15 countries, underlining our commitment to reaching more patients. Next slide, please. Our rare disease sales increased by 9%. This was driven by sales in North America operations of 20%, while sales in international operations were unchanged.
pairs.zh:
在国际业务中，Wegovy现已在超过15个国家推出，彰显了我们惠及更多患者的承诺。请翻到下一张幻灯片。我们的罕见病销售额增长了9%。这得益于北美业务销售额增长20%，而国际业务销售额持平。

In international operations, Wegovy has now been launched in more than 15 countries, underlining our commitment to reaching more patients. Next slide, please. Our rare disease sales increased by 9%. This was driven by sales in North America operations of 20%, while sales in international operations were unchanged.

pairs.en: Sales of rare endocrine disorder products increased by 31%, driven by launches of Sogroya and increased Norditropin supply, as well as a positive impact from gross-to-net sales adjustments in the U.S. Rare blood disorders sales increased by 3%, driven by an increase in hemophilia B sales. Now I will turn it over to Martin for an R&D update.
pairs.zh:
罕见内分泌疾病产品的销售额增长了31%，主要得益于Sogroya的上市和Norditropin供应的增加，以及美国总净销售额调整带来的积极影响。罕见血液疾病产品的销售额增长了3%，主要得益于B型血友病销售额的增长。现在我将把发言权交给Martin，由他介绍研发进展。

Sales of rare endocrine disorder products increased by 31%, driven by launches of Sogroya and increased Norditropin supply, as well as a positive impact from gross-to-net sales adjustments in the U.S. Rare blood disorders sales increased by 3%, driven by an increase in hemophilia B sales. Now I will turn it over to Martin for an R&D update.

pairs.en: Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development
pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Thank you, Dave. Please turn to the next slide. In December, Novo Nordisk released the headline results from the first pivotal trial with CagriSema REDEFINE 1 in people living with obesity or overweight. Before getting into the results, I would like to quickly touch upon the trial design.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Dave。请翻到下一张幻灯片。12月，Novo Nordisk公布了CagriSema REDEFINE 1在肥胖或超重人群中进行的首个关键试验的总体结果。在讨论结果之前，我想快速介绍一下试验设计。

Thank you, Dave. Please turn to the next slide. In December, Novo Nordisk released the headline results from the first pivotal trial with CagriSema REDEFINE 1 in people living with obesity or overweight. Before getting into the results, I would like to quickly touch upon the trial design.

pairs.en: Based on the CagriSema weight loss data observed in Phase 1 and 2 trials, we incorporated a flexible protocol in REDEFINE 1. The protocol followed a 16-week titration schedule and permitted dose modifications based on tolerability or concerns about excessive weight loss throughout the trial. This was done to balance efficacy, tolerability, and trial dropout. REDEFINE 1 was a 68-week efficacy and safety trial with 3,417 people enrolled.
pairs.zh:
基于在Phase 1和2试验中观察到的CagriSema减重数据，我们在REDEFINE 1中采用了灵活方案。该方案遵循16周的剂量滴定计划，并允许在整个试验期间根据耐受性或对体重过度减轻的担忧调整剂量。这样做是为了平衡疗效、耐受性和试验退出率。REDEFINE 1是一项为期68周的疗效和安全性试验，共入组3,417人。

Based on the CagriSema weight loss data observed in Phase 1 and 2 trials, we incorporated a flexible protocol in REDEFINE 1. The protocol followed a 16-week titration schedule and permitted dose modifications based on tolerability or concerns about excessive weight loss throughout the trial. This was done to balance efficacy, tolerability, and trial dropout. REDEFINE 1 was a 68-week efficacy and safety trial with 3,417 people enrolled.

pairs.en: People were randomly assigned to either receive CagriSema, a fixed-dose combination of cagrilintide 2.4 milligrams and semaglutide 2.4 milligrams, or cagrilintide 2.4 milligrams in monotherapy, semaglutide 2.4 milligrams in monotherapy, or placebo. In line with regulatory guidelines, the purpose of the trial was to demonstrate superiority of CagriSema over placebo, cagrilintide and semaglutide on body weight reduction. Next slide, please. Previous trials and our modeling indicated that CagriSema could provide a potential weight loss of approximately 25%, while the 25% weight loss was not observed in REDEFINE 1, we are encouraged by the weight loss profile of CagriSema which stands out as one of the most substantial weight reductions observed in a clinical Phase 3a trial.
pairs.zh:
受试者被随机分配接受CagriSema（cagrilintide 2.4毫克与semaglutide 2.4毫克的固定剂量组合）、cagrilintide 2.4毫克单药治疗、semaglutide 2.4毫克单药治疗或安慰剂。根据监管指南，该试验旨在证明CagriSema在减轻体重方面优于安慰剂、cagrilintide和semaglutide。请看下一张幻灯片。先前的试验和我们的模型表明，CagriSema可能实现约25%的体重减轻，虽然REDEFINE 1试验中未观察到25%的体重减轻，但我们对CagriSema的减重效果感到鼓舞，它是在3a期临床试验中观察到的最显著的体重减轻之一。

People were randomly assigned to either receive CagriSema, a fixed-dose combination of cagrilintide 2.4 milligrams and semaglutide 2.4 milligrams, or cagrilintide 2.4 milligrams in monotherapy, semaglutide 2.4 milligrams in monotherapy, or placebo. In line with regulatory guidelines, the purpose of the trial was to demonstrate superiority of CagriSema over placebo, cagrilintide and semaglutide on body weight reduction. Next slide, please. Previous trials and our modeling indicated that CagriSema could provide a potential weight loss of approximately 25%, while the 25% weight loss was not observed in REDEFINE 1, we are encouraged by the weight loss profile of CagriSema which stands out as one of the most substantial weight reductions observed in a clinical Phase 3a trial.

pairs.en: From a mean baseline body weight of 106.9 kg, CagriSema demonstrated a superior and clinically relevant loss of 22.7% of body weight after 68 weeks, compared to reductions of 11.8% with cagrilintide, 16.1% with semaglutide, and 2.3% with placebo. In the trial, CagriSema appeared to have a safe and well-tolerated profile. The most common adverse events were gastrointestinal with the vast majority being mild to moderate and decreasing over time, in line with GLP-1 receptor agonist class. Generally, we observed a low level of gastrointestinal adverse events.
pairs.zh:
从平均基线体重106.9 kg开始，CagriSema在68周后实现了22.7%的优越且具临床意义的体重减轻，而cagrilintide组减轻11.8%，semaglutide组减轻16.1%，安慰剂组减轻2.3%。试验中，CagriSema显示出安全且耐受性良好的特征。最常见的不良事件为胃肠道事件，绝大多数为轻度至中度，且随时间推移而减少，这与GLP-1受体激动剂类别一致。总体而言，我们观察到胃肠道不良事件的发生率较低。

From a mean baseline body weight of 106.9 kg, CagriSema demonstrated a superior and clinically relevant loss of 22.7% of body weight after 68 weeks, compared to reductions of 11.8% with cagrilintide, 16.1% with semaglutide, and 2.3% with placebo. In the trial, CagriSema appeared to have a safe and well-tolerated profile. The most common adverse events were gastrointestinal with the vast majority being mild to moderate and decreasing over time, in line with GLP-1 receptor agonist class. Generally, we observed a low level of gastrointestinal adverse events.

pairs.en: People on CagriSema experienced 2.8 gastrointestinal events per patient per year, compared to 1.2 on cagrilintide and 2.6 on semaglutide 2.4 milligrams. Discontinuation rates due to gastrointestinal-related adverse events were also low with 3% -- 3.6% in the CagriSema arm. For both the cagrilintide and the semaglutide arm, the gastrointestinal discontinuation were 1.3%. Notably, the severity of gastrointestinal events for cagrilintide was similar to the comparator arm.
pairs.zh:
服用CagriSema的患者每年每例患者经历2.8次胃肠道事件，而服用cagrilintide的患者为1.2次，服用semaglutide 2.4毫克的患者为2.6次。因胃肠道相关不良事件导致的停药率也较低，CagriSema组为3%至3.6%。在cagrilintide组和semaglutide组中，胃肠道相关停药率均为1.3%。值得注意的是，cagrilintide的胃肠道事件严重程度与对照组相似。

People on CagriSema experienced 2.8 gastrointestinal events per patient per year, compared to 1.2 on cagrilintide and 2.6 on semaglutide 2.4 milligrams. Discontinuation rates due to gastrointestinal-related adverse events were also low with 3% -- 3.6% in the CagriSema arm. For both the cagrilintide and the semaglutide arm, the gastrointestinal discontinuation were 1.3%. Notably, the severity of gastrointestinal events for cagrilintide was similar to the comparator arm.

pairs.en: As a reference, in step 1, semaglutide 2.4 milligrams had a discontinuation rate due to gastrointestinal-related adverse events of 4.5%. Lastly, the overall discontinuation rate for CagriSema was 11.7%. For comparison, semaglutide showed a discontinuation rate of 17% in step 1. In the REDEFINE 1 trial, the extent of dose modification prompted us to conduct a more in-depth analysis of people receiving the highest dose at 68 weeks, followed by an analysis of people on lower doses at 68 weeks.
pairs.zh:
作为参考，在步骤1中，semaglutide 2.4毫克因胃肠道相关不良事件导致的停药率为4.5%。最后，CagriSema的总体停药率为11.7%。相比之下，semaglutide在步骤1中的停药率为17%。在REDEFINE 1试验中，剂量调整的程度促使我们对接受最高剂量至68周的人群进行了更深入的分析，随后又分析了68周时接受较低剂量的人群。

As a reference, in step 1, semaglutide 2.4 milligrams had a discontinuation rate due to gastrointestinal-related adverse events of 4.5%. Lastly, the overall discontinuation rate for CagriSema was 11.7%. For comparison, semaglutide showed a discontinuation rate of 17% in step 1. In the REDEFINE 1 trial, the extent of dose modification prompted us to conduct a more in-depth analysis of people receiving the highest dose at 68 weeks, followed by an analysis of people on lower doses at 68 weeks.

pairs.en: In the following slide, I will guide you through a post-hoc analysis based on these two subgroups and share some reflections and considerations regarding the data. Next slide, please. The first subgroup comprised 57% of the total population and consisted of people in the trial who ended on the highest 2.4 milligrams dose of CagriSema at 68 weeks. The second group accounted for 29% of the population consisted of those who were at lower doses of CagriSema at 68 weeks.
pairs.zh:
在接下来的幻灯片中，我将引导您了解基于这两个亚组的事后分析，并分享一些关于数据的反思和考量。下一张幻灯片。第一个亚组占总人群的57%，由试验中在68周时最终使用最高剂量2.4毫克CagriSema的受试者组成。第二个亚组占总人群的29%，由在68周时使用较低剂量CagriSema的受试者组成。

In the following slide, I will guide you through a post-hoc analysis based on these two subgroups and share some reflections and considerations regarding the data. Next slide, please. The first subgroup comprised 57% of the total population and consisted of people in the trial who ended on the highest 2.4 milligrams dose of CagriSema at 68 weeks. The second group accounted for 29% of the population consisted of those who were at lower doses of CagriSema at 68 weeks.

pairs.en: The remaining 14% of the population were on either treatment pause or had been discontinued at 68 weeks. The first subgroup achieved a 12.7% mean weight loss at 20 weeks and a full 22.2% mean weight loss at 68 weeks. The weight loss trajectory for the first subgroup did not plateau at 68 weeks. CagriSema showed a high tolerability with fewer gastrointestinal adverse events compared to semaglutide 2.4 milligrams.
pairs.zh:
剩余14%的人群在68周时处于治疗暂停或已停药状态。第一个亚组在20周时实现平均体重减轻12.7%，在68周时达到完全平均体重减轻22.2%。该亚组的体重减轻趋势在68周时并未趋于平稳。与司美格鲁肽2.4毫克相比，CagriSema表现出更高的耐受性，且胃肠道不良事件更少。

The remaining 14% of the population were on either treatment pause or had been discontinued at 68 weeks. The first subgroup achieved a 12.7% mean weight loss at 20 weeks and a full 22.2% mean weight loss at 68 weeks. The weight loss trajectory for the first subgroup did not plateau at 68 weeks. CagriSema showed a high tolerability with fewer gastrointestinal adverse events compared to semaglutide 2.4 milligrams.

pairs.en: This suggests that additional weight loss could be achieved with a trial of longer duration. The second subgroup showed a potent treatment response by achieving 15.9% mean weight loss at 20 weeks and 25.1% at 68 weeks, approaching a normal BMI at the end of treatment. The average treatment dose was 1.1 milligrams at 68 weeks. Those reductions occurred from the mid-trial to end of treatment and did not occur to gastrointestinal adverse events alone.
pairs.zh:
这表明，若试验持续时间更长，或可实现更多体重减轻。第二亚组呈现出显著的治疗反应，在第20周时平均体重减轻15.9%，第68周时达25.1%，至治疗结束时已接近正常BMI。第68周时的平均治疗剂量为1.1毫克。这些体重下降发生在试验中期至治疗结束期间，且并非仅由胃肠道不良事件导致。

This suggests that additional weight loss could be achieved with a trial of longer duration. The second subgroup showed a potent treatment response by achieving 15.9% mean weight loss at 20 weeks and 25.1% at 68 weeks, approaching a normal BMI at the end of treatment. The average treatment dose was 1.1 milligrams at 68 weeks. Those reductions occurred from the mid-trial to end of treatment and did not occur to gastrointestinal adverse events alone.

pairs.en: This group of people could potentially achieve higher weight loss with higher doses through increased focus on dose escalation -- dose reescalation, as well as longer treatment duration. Overall, CagriSema demonstrates a potent treatment response resulting in a superior weight loss efficacy compared to semaglutide. Furthermore, the REDEFINE 1 data indicate that a patient-centric and individualized treatment regimen which take the initial dose escalation -- dose reescalation and trial duration into account could potentially enhance efficacy of CagriSema while maintaining a favorable safety profile. While it may appear counterintuitive that lower doses of CagriSema leads to more substantial weight loss.
pairs.zh:
这群人通过更关注剂量递增（包括剂量重新递增）以及更长的治疗周期，有望在更高剂量下实现更大的体重减轻。总体而言，CagriSema相比semaglutide展现出更强的治疗效果，从而带来更优的减重效果。此外，REDEFINE 1研究数据表明，以患者为中心、个体化的治疗方案（考虑初始剂量递增、剂量重新递增及试验周期）可能既增强CagriSema的疗效，又维持其良好的安全性。尽管较低剂量的CagriSema反而带来更显著的体重减轻，这看似有悖常理。

原文：This group of people could potentially achieve higher weight loss with higher doses through increased focus on dose escalation -- dose reescalation, as well as longer treatment duration. Overall, CagriSema demonstrates a potent treatment response resulting in a superior weight loss efficacy compared to semaglutide. Furthermore, the REDEFINE 1 data indicate that a patient-centric and individualized treatment regimen which take the initial dose escalation -- dose reescalation and trial duration into account could potentially enhance efficacy of CagriSema while maintaining a favorable safety profile. While it may appear counterintuitive that lower doses of CagriSema leads to more substantial weight loss.

pairs.en: This patent is consistent with the observations from the step and step-up trials with semaglutide. However, it appears to be more pronounced with the potent biology of CagriSema. In addition, we have previously observed very responses to anti-obesity medications across different populations. Based on the insights from REDEFINE 1 and the reflection I've just shared with you on the data will further explore Cagrisema potential in a new Phase 3 trial, REDEFINE 11.
pairs.zh:
这项专利与semaglutide的step和step-up试验中的观察结果一致。然而，在CagriSema的强效生物学作用下，这种效果似乎更为显著。此外，我们之前观察到不同人群对减肥药物的反应非常不同。基于REDEFINE 1的洞察以及我刚刚与您分享的对数据的反思，我们将通过一项新的3期试验REDEFINE 11进一步探索Cagrisema的潜力。

This patent is consistent with the observations from the step and step-up trials with semaglutide. However, it appears to be more pronounced with the potent biology of CagriSema. In addition, we have previously observed very responses to anti-obesity medications across different populations. Based on the insights from REDEFINE 1 and the reflection I've just shared with you on the data will further explore Cagrisema potential in a new Phase 3 trial, REDEFINE 11.

pairs.en: The trial will have a longer trial duration and focus on dose escalation and reescalation. Next slide, please. Turning toward the next step for CagriSema. We are currently anticipating the results of REDEFINE 2 in the first quarter of 2025.
pairs.zh:
该试验将延长试验持续时间，并侧重于剂量递增和重新递增。请切换到下一张幻灯片。接下来看向CagriSema的下一步。我们目前正在期待REDEFINE 2在2025年第一季度的结果。

The trial will have a longer trial duration and focus on dose escalation and reescalation. Next slide, please. Turning toward the next step for CagriSema. We are currently anticipating the results of REDEFINE 2 in the first quarter of 2025.

pairs.en: The REDEFINE 11 trial will be initiated in the first half of 2025 and we now expect to submit CagriSema in the first quarter of 2026. The adjusted timelines are not related to the redefined development program but driven by supply chain reticentness when launching into a large and rapidly expanding market of obesity. Next slide, please. Earlier this year, Novo Nordisk announced the headline results from the Phase 3 trial step-up with semaglutide 7.2 milligram.
pairs.zh:
REDEFINE 11试验将于2025年上半年启动，我们现在预计在2026年第一季度提交CagriSema。调整后的时间线并非源于重新定义的开发计划，而是由于进入庞大且快速扩张的肥胖市场时供应链方面的谨慎态度。请翻到下一张幻灯片。今年早些时候，Novo Nordisk公布了semaglutide 7.2毫克3期试验step-up的主要结果。

The REDEFINE 11 trial will be initiated in the first half of 2025 and we now expect to submit CagriSema in the first quarter of 2026. The adjusted timelines are not related to the redefined development program but driven by supply chain reticentness when launching into a large and rapidly expanding market of obesity. Next slide, please. Earlier this year, Novo Nordisk announced the headline results from the Phase 3 trial step-up with semaglutide 7.2 milligram.

pairs.en: The 72-week efficacy and safety trial investigated subcutaneous semaglutide 7.2 milligram, compared to semaglutide 2.4 milligram and placebo. 1,407 people with obesity were enrolled in the trial with a BMI of 30 or higher without diabetes. The mean baseline body weight was 113 kilograms. When evaluating the effects of treatment when all people are here to treatment after 72 weeks, semaglutide 7.2 milligram achieved a superior weight loss of 20.7%, compared to a reduction of 17.5% of semaglutide 2.4 milligram and 2.4% with placebo.
pairs.zh:
这项为期72周的有效性和安全性试验研究了皮下注射semaglutide 7.2毫克，与semaglutide 2.4毫克及安慰剂的对比。试验纳入了1,407名肥胖患者，其BMI为30或更高且无糖尿病。平均基线体重为113公斤。当评估所有在72周后仍在接受治疗的患者的效果时，semaglutide 7.2毫克实现了20.7%的卓越减重效果，而semaglutide 2.4毫克减重17.5%，安慰剂组减重2.4%。

The 72-week efficacy and safety trial investigated subcutaneous semaglutide 7.2 milligram, compared to semaglutide 2.4 milligram and placebo. 1,407 people with obesity were enrolled in the trial with a BMI of 30 or higher without diabetes. The mean baseline body weight was 113 kilograms. When evaluating the effects of treatment when all people are here to treatment after 72 weeks, semaglutide 7.2 milligram achieved a superior weight loss of 20.7%, compared to a reduction of 17.5% of semaglutide 2.4 milligram and 2.4% with placebo.

pairs.en: In the trial, semaglutide 7.2 milligrams appear to have a safe and well-tolerated profile. We have also completed the step-up trial in an obese population with type 2 diabetes and are now evaluating the next steps in light of our overall obesity portfolio. Next slide, please. Recently, we announced the headline results from the Phase 2b/2a trial with once-weekly subcutaneous amycretin in 125 people with overweight obesity.
pairs.zh:
在试验中，semaglutide 7.2毫克显示出安全且耐受性良好的特征。我们还完成了针对患有2型糖尿病的肥胖人群的逐步试验，目前正在根据我们的整体肥胖产品组合评估下一步计划。请翻到下一张幻灯片。最近，我们公布了每周一次皮下注射amycretin在125名超重肥胖人群中的2b/2a期试验的主要结果。

In the trial, semaglutide 7.2 milligrams appear to have a safe and well-tolerated profile. We have also completed the step-up trial in an obese population with type 2 diabetes and are now evaluating the next steps in light of our overall obesity portfolio. Next slide, please. Recently, we announced the headline results from the Phase 2b/2a trial with once-weekly subcutaneous amycretin in 125 people with overweight obesity.

pairs.en: The trial was a combined single ascending dose, multiple ascending dose, and dose response trial investigating three different maintenance doses with a total treatment duration of up to 36 weeks. The primary endpoint was a treatment was treatment-emergent adverse events. The most common adverse events were gastrointestinal and the vast majority were mild to moderate in severity. Overall, the safety profile of amycretin was consistent with amycretin-based therapies.
pairs.zh:
该试验是一项结合了单次递增剂量、多次递增剂量和剂量反应的试验，研究了三种不同的维持剂量，总治疗时长长达36周。主要终点是治疗期间出现的不良事件。最常见的不良事件为胃肠道相关，且绝大多数严重程度为轻度至中度。总体而言，amycretin的安全性特征与基于amycretin的疗法一致。

The trial was a combined single ascending dose, multiple ascending dose, and dose response trial investigating three different maintenance doses with a total treatment duration of up to 36 weeks. The primary endpoint was a treatment was treatment-emergent adverse events. The most common adverse events were gastrointestinal and the vast majority were mild to moderate in severity. Overall, the safety profile of amycretin was consistent with amycretin-based therapies.

pairs.en: People in the dose-response part of the trial had a baseline body weight of 92.7 kilograms. People treated with amycretin achieved an estimated body weight loss of 0.7%, 16.2%, and 22% at their respective doses. This was achieved on 1.2 -- sorry, 1.25 milligrams, 5 milligrams, and 20 milligrams, respectively. This compared to a body weight gain of between 1.9% to 2.3% for people treated with placebo.
pairs.zh:
试验剂量反应部分的参与者基线体重为92.7公斤。接受amycretin治疗的参与者，在各自剂量下实现了估计体重减轻0.7%、16.2%和22%。这分别在1.2——抱歉，1.25毫克、5毫克和20毫克的剂量下实现。相比之下，接受安慰剂治疗的参与者体重增加了1.9%至2.3%。

People in the dose-response part of the trial had a baseline body weight of 92.7 kilograms. People treated with amycretin achieved an estimated body weight loss of 0.7%, 16.2%, and 22% at their respective doses. This was achieved on 1.2 -- sorry, 1.25 milligrams, 5 milligrams, and 20 milligrams, respectively. This compared to a body weight gain of between 1.9% to 2.3% for people treated with placebo.

pairs.en: The effect of treatment was evaluated if all people were adherent to treatment. We are very encouraged by the results for subcutaneous amycretin for people living with overweight obesity. And based on the results, we are now planning for further clinical development of amycretin in people with overweight obesity. Next slide, please.
pairs.zh:
如果所有患者都坚持治疗，则评估治疗效果。我们对皮下注射amycretin用于超重肥胖患者的结果感到非常鼓舞。基于这些结果，我们现在正在规划amycretin在超重肥胖患者中的进一步临床开发。请下一张幻灯片。

The effect of treatment was evaluated if all people were adherent to treatment. We are very encouraged by the results for subcutaneous amycretin for people living with overweight obesity. And based on the results, we are now planning for further clinical development of amycretin in people with overweight obesity. Next slide, please.

pairs.en: Overall, we have a competitive portfolio in obesity underlined by the recent readouts from CagriSema, semaglutide 7.3 milligrams, and subcutaneous amycretin. Our strategic ambitions remains to build a portfolio of superior treatment options in obesity and a focus on efficacy, safety, and scalability, be it injectable at all. Our marketed portfolio started with Saxenda. We then set the bar with the Wegovy's attractive clinical profile with double-digit weight loss and a proven cardiovascular risk reduction from the SELECT trial.
pairs.zh:
总体而言，我们在肥胖领域拥有具有竞争力的产品组合，这得益于近期CagriSema、semaglutide 7.3毫克以及皮下注射amycretin的读出数据。我们的战略目标依然是构建在肥胖治疗中更具优势的产品组合，并专注于疗效、安全性和可扩展性——无论是注射剂型还是其他剂型。我们已上市的产品组合始于Saxenda，随后以Wegovy令人瞩目的临床特征树立了新标杆，包括实现两位数体重减轻以及来自SELECT试验证实的心血管风险降低。

Overall, we have a competitive portfolio in obesity underlined by the recent readouts from CagriSema, semaglutide 7.3 milligrams, and subcutaneous amycretin. Our strategic ambitions remains to build a portfolio of superior treatment options in obesity and a focus on efficacy, safety, and scalability, be it injectable at all. Our marketed portfolio started with Saxenda. We then set the bar with the Wegovy's attractive clinical profile with double-digit weight loss and a proven cardiovascular risk reduction from the SELECT trial.

pairs.en: In the short term, we expect to increase our competitiveness further with semaglutide 7.2 milligrams, as well as oral semaglutide 25 milligrams. As illustrated on the right-hand side of the slide, the next-generation anti-obesity medications in our pipeline feature multiple different mode of actions that can address different segments in the obesity market. Selected highlights are the planned Phase 3 trial with cagrilintide in more therapy, further development based on the promising amycretin Phase 1/2 data and the initiation of our triple agonist Phase 1 trial. We look forward to sharing data from all of these trials when they read out.
pairs.zh:
短期内，我们期望通过7.2毫克司美格鲁肽以及25毫克口服司美格鲁肽进一步提升竞争力。如幻灯片右侧所示，我们研发管线中的下一代抗肥胖药物拥有多种不同作用机制，可针对肥胖市场的不同细分领域。重点亮点包括：计划启动卡格林肽联合疗法的三期临床试验；基于令人鼓舞的艾米克雷汀一期/二期数据开展进一步开发；以及启动三靶点激动剂一期临床试验。我们期待在相关试验数据公布时与大家分享。

In the short term, we expect to increase our competitiveness further with semaglutide 7.2 milligrams, as well as oral semaglutide 25 milligrams. As illustrated on the right-hand side of the slide, the next-generation anti-obesity medications in our pipeline feature multiple different mode of actions that can address different segments in the obesity market. Selected highlights are the planned Phase 3 trial with cagrilintide in more therapy, further development based on the promising amycretin Phase 1/2 data and the initiation of our triple agonist Phase 1 trial. We look forward to sharing data from all of these trials when they read out.

pairs.en: Next slide, please. Turning to the upcoming R&D milestones. We look forward to a year with many exciting trial readouts. Before turning to 2025, I would like to highlight a few milestones from the last few months.
pairs.zh:
请翻到下一页。接下来，我们来看未来研发里程碑。我们期待未来一年会有许多令人兴奋的试验结果公布。在转向2025年之前，我想强调过去几个月里的几个里程碑。

Next slide, please. Turning to the upcoming R&D milestones. We look forward to a year with many exciting trial readouts. Before turning to 2025, I would like to highlight a few milestones from the last few months.

pairs.en: We continue our focus on investigating how our innovative treatment impact related comorbidities in diabetes and obesity. Positively, Ozempic is now the only GLP-1 receptor agonist proven to reduce the risk of chronic kidney disease in people with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease. This is based on the data from the FLOW trial and positive opinion from the European regulatory authorities and a U.S. FDA approval.
pairs.zh:
我们继续专注于研究创新疗法如何影响糖尿病和肥胖症的相关合并症。令人振奋的是，Ozempic目前是唯一一种被证明可降低2型糖尿病合并慢性肾病患者慢性肾病风险的GLP-1受体激动剂。这一结论基于FLOW试验数据、欧洲监管机构的正面意见以及美国FDA的批准。

原文：
We continue our focus on investigating how our innovative treatment impact related comorbidities in diabetes and obesity. Positively, Ozempic is now the only GLP-1 receptor agonist proven to reduce the risk of chronic kidney disease in people with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease. This is based on the data from the FLOW trial and positive opinion from the European regulatory authorities and a U.S. FDA approval.

pairs.en: We have also submitted the label extension applications for oral to mega site 14 milligram on the Rybelsus brand to U.S. and the European authorities based on the data from the [Inaudible]. Further, we have resubmitted the results from the STEP HFpEF trials with a magnetite 2.4 milligram in people with obesity to the U.S. FDA.
pairs.zh:
我们也已基于[听不清]的数据，向美国和欧洲监管机构提交了针对Rybelsus品牌口服至最大剂量14毫克的标签扩展申请。此外，我们已重新向美国FDA提交了在肥胖人群中使用magnetite 2.4毫克的STEP HFpEF试验结果。

We have also submitted the label extension applications for oral to mega site 14 milligram on the Rybelsus brand to U.S. and the European authorities based on the data from the [Inaudible]. Further, we have resubmitted the results from the STEP HFpEF trials with a magnetite 2.4 milligram in people with obesity to the U.S. FDA.

pairs.en: The submission includes data from FLOW and so, further substantiating the benefits of semaglutide for patients with heart failure. Excitingly, we have initiated a Phase 1 trial with a once-weekly subcutaneous triagonist in people with overweight obesity in the fourth quarter of 2024. Moving to the milestones in 2025. I would like to start with a few exciting data readouts in type 2 diabetes in the second half that supports our aspirations of raising the innovation bar.
pairs.zh:
该提交材料包含了来自FLOW的数据，进一步证实了semaglutide对心力衰竭患者的益处。令人兴奋的是，我们已在2024年第四季度启动了一项针对超重肥胖人群的每周一次皮下注射三激动剂的1期试验。接下来是2025年的里程碑。我想先介绍下半年在2型糖尿病方面的一些令人振奋的数据解读，这些数据支撑了我们提升创新标准的愿景。

The submission includes data from FLOW and so, further substantiating the benefits of semaglutide for patients with heart failure. Excitingly, we have initiated a Phase 1 trial with a once-weekly subcutaneous triagonist in people with overweight obesity in the fourth quarter of 2024. Moving to the milestones in 2025. I would like to start with a few exciting data readouts in type 2 diabetes in the second half that supports our aspirations of raising the innovation bar.

pairs.en: Specifically, we expect the first Phase 3 results from CagriSema, as well as Phase 2 results for both subcutaneous and amycretin and once weekly GIP/GLP-1 co-agonist. Moving to obesity and the first half of '25. We are now expecting to submit or semaglutide 25 milligram for people with obesity to the U.S. regulatory authorities in the first quarter.
pairs.zh:
具体而言，我们预计CagriSema的首个Phase 3结果，以及皮下和amycretin以及每周一次的GIP/GLP-1共同激动剂的Phase 2结果。接下来是肥胖症和2025年上半年。我们现在预计在第一季度向美国监管机构提交或semaglutide 25毫克用于肥胖症患者。

Specifically, we expect the first Phase 3 results from CagriSema, as well as Phase 2 results for both subcutaneous and amycretin and once weekly GIP/GLP-1 co-agonist. Moving to obesity and the first half of '25. We are now expecting to submit or semaglutide 25 milligram for people with obesity to the U.S. regulatory authorities in the first quarter.

pairs.en: Furthermore, we also expect Phase 2 results from the once-weekly GLP-1, GIP co-agonist. For CagriSema, specifically, we expect results from REDEFINE 2 and REDEFINE 4, during 2025 and to initiate the new REDEFINE 1 trial later during the first half of 2025. Within rare disease, we expect regulatory submissions of Mim8 in the U.S. and in the EU in the first half -- sorry, in the second half of 2025.
pairs.zh:
此外，我们还预计每周一次的GLP-1、GIP双激动剂将发布2期结果。具体到CagriSema，我们预计将在2025年期间获得REDEFINE 2和REDEFINE 4的结果，并于2025年上半年晚些时候启动新的REDEFINE 1试验。在罕见病领域，我们预计将于2025年上半年——抱歉，是2025年下半年在美国和欧盟提交Mim8的监管申请。

Furthermore, we also expect Phase 2 results from the once-weekly GLP-1, GIP co-agonist. For CagriSema, specifically, we expect results from REDEFINE 2 and REDEFINE 4, during 2025 and to initiate the new REDEFINE 1 trial later during the first half of 2025. Within rare disease, we expect regulatory submissions of Mim8 in the U.S. and in the EU in the first half -- sorry, in the second half of 2025.

pairs.en: With then cardiovascular and emerging therapy areas, we look forward to read out the -- sorry, we look forward to the readout of the evoke and the evoke+ trials in patients with early Alzheimer's disease. With that, over to you, Karsten.
pairs.zh:
凭借当时的心血管和新兴疗法领域，我们期待阅读——抱歉，我们期待evoke和evoke+试验在早期阿尔茨海默病患者中的结果公布。接下来，交给你，Karsten。

With then cardiovascular and emerging therapy areas, we look forward to read out the -- sorry, we look forward to the readout of the evoke and the evoke+ trials in patients with early Alzheimer's disease. With that, over to you, Karsten.

pairs.en: Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Karsten Munk Knudsen——执行副总裁、首席财务官

Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Martin. Please turn to the next slide. In 2024, our sales grew by 25% in Danish kroner and by 26% at constant exchange rates, driven by both operating units. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你，Martin。请翻到下一页幻灯片。2024年，我们的销售额以丹麦克朗计算增长了25%，按固定汇率计算增长了26%，这得益于两个运营部门的推动。在美国，销售额增长受到了总销售额与净销售额调整的积极影响。

Thank you, Martin. Please turn to the next slide. In 2024, our sales grew by 25% in Danish kroner and by 26% at constant exchange rates, driven by both operating units. In the U.S., sales growth was positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments.

pairs.en: The gross margin increased to 84.7%, compared to 84.6% in 2023. The increase is mainly driven by a positive price impact due to growth to net sales adjustments in the U.S. and the positive product mix. This is partially countered by costs related to ongoing capacity expansions.
pairs.zh:
毛利率增至84.7%，而2023年为84.6%。增长主要受到美国净销售额调整增长带来的积极价格影响以及有利的产品组合推动。这一影响部分被与持续产能扩张相关的成本所抵消。

The gross margin increased to 84.7%, compared to 84.6% in 2023. The increase is mainly driven by a positive price impact due to growth to net sales adjustments in the U.S. and the positive product mix. This is partially countered by costs related to ongoing capacity expansions.

pairs.en: Sales and distribution costs increased by 9% in Danish kroner and by 10% at constant exchange rates. In North America operations, the cost increase is mainly driven by promotional activities related to Wegovy. In international operations, the increase is mainly related to obesity care market development activities, Wegovy launch activities, as well as promotional activities for GLP-1 diabetes products. Additionally, the increase in sales institution costs is negatively impacted by an adjustment to legal provisions in 2023.
pairs.zh:
销售和分销成本以丹麦克朗计算增长9%，按固定汇率计算增长10%。在北美业务中，成本增加主要源于与Wegovy相关的促销活动。在国际业务中，增长主要与肥胖护理市场开发活动、Wegovy上市活动以及GLP-1糖尿病产品的促销活动有关。此外，销售机构成本的增加还受到2023年法律条款调整的不利影响。

Sales and distribution costs increased by 9% in Danish kroner and by 10% at constant exchange rates. In North America operations, the cost increase is mainly driven by promotional activities related to Wegovy. In international operations, the increase is mainly related to obesity care market development activities, Wegovy launch activities, as well as promotional activities for GLP-1 diabetes products. Additionally, the increase in sales institution costs is negatively impacted by an adjustment to legal provisions in 2023.

pairs.en: Research and development costs increased by 48%, both measured in Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. The increase in cost is mainly reflecting increased late-stage clinical trial activity, increased early research activities, as well as impairment losses related to intangible assets. Administration costs increased by 9% in both Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. Operating profit increased by 25% measured in Danish kroner and by 26% at constant exchange rates.
pairs.zh:
研发成本按丹麦克朗和固定汇率计算均增长了48%。成本增长主要反映出后期临床试验活动增加、早期研究活动增加以及无形资产减值损失。行政成本按丹麦克朗和固定汇率计算均增长了9%。营业利润按丹麦克朗计算增长了25%，按固定汇率计算增长了26%。

原文：
Research and development costs increased by 48%, both measured in Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. The increase in cost is mainly reflecting increased late-stage clinical trial activity, increased early research activities, as well as impairment losses related to intangible assets. Administration costs increased by 9% in both Danish kroner and at constant exchange rates. Operating profit increased by 25% measured in Danish kroner and by 26% at constant exchange rates.

pairs.en: Operating profit is positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments in the U.S. and negatively impacted by impairment losses. EBITDA increased by 32% in Danish Kroner and 33% at constant exchange rates. Net financial items showed a net loss of DKK 1.1 billion, compared to a net gain of DKK 2.1 billion last year.
pairs.zh:
营业利润受到美国总净销售额调整的积极影响和减值损失的消极影响。EBITDA以丹麦克朗计算增长32%，按固定汇率计算增长33%。净财务项目显示净亏损DKK 1.1 billion，而去年为净收益DKK 2.1 billion。

Operating profit is positively impacted by gross-to-net sales adjustments in the U.S. and negatively impacted by impairment losses. EBITDA increased by 32% in Danish Kroner and 33% at constant exchange rates. Net financial items showed a net loss of DKK 1.1 billion, compared to a net gain of DKK 2.1 billion last year.

pairs.en: This primarily reflects losses on nonhedged currencies. The effective tax rate was 20.6% in 2024, compared to 20.1% in 2023. Net profit increased by 21% and diluted earnings per share increased by 22% to DKK 22.63. Net profit and diluted earnings per share are impacted by the impairments related to intangible assets.
pairs.zh:
这主要反映了未对冲货币的损失。2024年有效税率为20.6%，而2023年为20.1%。净利润增长21%，稀释每股收益增长22%至DKK 22.63。净利润和稀释每股收益受到无形资产相关减值的影响。

This primarily reflects losses on nonhedged currencies. The effective tax rate was 20.6% in 2024, compared to 20.1% in 2023. Net profit increased by 21% and diluted earnings per share increased by 22% to DKK 22.63. Net profit and diluted earnings per share are impacted by the impairments related to intangible assets.

pairs.en: Cash flow from operating activities in 2024 was realized at DKK 121 billion, an increase of DKK 12 billion versus 2023. As for allocation of DKK 47 billion to capex for supply chain and around DKK 82 billion related to Catalent site acquisition results in free cash flow of minus DKK 14.7 billion. This compares to DKK 68.3 billion in 2023. Please go to the next slide.
pairs.zh:
2024年经营活动现金流实现1210亿丹麦克朗，较2023年增加120亿丹麦克朗。其中，供应链资本支出分配470亿丹麦克朗，约820亿丹麦克朗用于Catalent工厂收购，导致自由现金流为负147亿丹麦克朗。相比之下，2023年自由现金流为683亿丹麦克朗。请翻至下一页。

Cash flow from operating activities in 2024 was realized at DKK 121 billion, an increase of DKK 12 billion versus 2023. As for allocation of DKK 47 billion to capex for supply chain and around DKK 82 billion related to Catalent site acquisition results in free cash flow of minus DKK 14.7 billion. This compares to DKK 68.3 billion in 2023. Please go to the next slide.

pairs.en: In line with our strategic aspiration to deliver attractive capital allocation to shareholders, we have returned DKK 64.3 billion to shareholders via dividends and share buyback during 2024. At the annual general meeting on 27th of March 2025, the board of directors will propose a final dividend of DKK 7.90 for a total 2024 dividend of DKK 11.40 including the interim dividend paid in August 2024. This is a 21% increase compared to 2023, making it the 29th consecutive year with increasing dividend per share. In addition to the dividend, the DKK 20 billion share buyback program for the past 12 months has been concluded.
pairs.zh:
根据我们为股东提供有吸引力资本配置的战略愿景，我们在2024年通过股息和股票回购向股东返还了DKK 643亿。在2025年3月27日的年度股东大会上，董事会将提议每股期末股息DKK 7.90，使得2024年总股息达到DKK 11.40（包括2024年8月支付的中期股息）。这比2023年增长了21%，标志着每股股息连续第29年增加。除股息外，过去12个月的DKK 200亿股票回购计划也已结束。

原文：
In line with our strategic aspiration to deliver attractive capital allocation to shareholders, we have returned DKK 64.3 billion to shareholders via dividends and share buyback during 2024. At the annual general meeting on 27th of March 2025, the board of directors will propose a final dividend of DKK 7.90 for a total 2024 dividend of DKK 11.40 including the interim dividend paid in August 2024. This is a 21% increase compared to 2023, making it the 29th consecutive year with increasing dividend per share. In addition to the dividend, the DKK 20 billion share buyback program for the past 12 months has been concluded.

pairs.en: Novo Nordisk capital allocation priorities prioritize attractive investments into the company, including supply chain expansions and R&D, as well as consistent dividend payout. Consequently, following the further step-up in capex, Novo Nordisk is not initiating a new share buyback program at this point in time. Please go to the next slide. We continued the growth momentum in 2025 and expect the sales growth to be between 16% and 24% at constant exchange rates.
pairs.zh:
Novo Nordisk的资本配置优先事项注重对公司的有吸引力投资，包括供应链扩展和研发，以及持续的股息派发。因此，在资本支出进一步增加后，Novo Nordisk目前未启动新的股票回购计划。请翻到下一页。我们在2025年继续保持增长势头，预计按固定汇率计算销售额增长将在16%至24%之间。

Novo Nordisk capital allocation priorities prioritize attractive investments into the company, including supply chain expansions and R&D, as well as consistent dividend payout. Consequently, following the further step-up in capex, Novo Nordisk is not initiating a new share buyback program at this point in time. Please go to the next slide. We continued the growth momentum in 2025 and expect the sales growth to be between 16% and 24% at constant exchange rates.

pairs.en: This is based on several assumptions as described in the company announcements. The guidance reflects expansion expectations for sales growth in both North America operations and international operations. the sales growth is expected to be mainly driven by volume growth of GLP-1-based treatment for obesity and diabetes care, also reflecting our continued scaling of our supply chain. Our reported sales are expected to be 3 percentage points higher compared to constant exchange rates and operating profit is expected to be 5 percentage points higher compared to constant exchange rates.
pairs.zh:
这是基于公司公告中所述的几项假设。该指引反映了对北美业务和国际业务销售增长扩张的预期。销售增长预计主要由基于GLP-1的肥胖症和糖尿病护理治疗药物销量增长推动，同时也体现了我们供应链持续扩大的成果。与固定汇率相比，我们的报告销售额预计将高出3个百分点，营业利润预计将高出5个百分点。

This is based on several assumptions as described in the company announcements. The guidance reflects expansion expectations for sales growth in both North America operations and international operations. the sales growth is expected to be mainly driven by volume growth of GLP-1-based treatment for obesity and diabetes care, also reflecting our continued scaling of our supply chain. Our reported sales are expected to be 3 percentage points higher compared to constant exchange rates and operating profit is expected to be 5 percentage points higher compared to constant exchange rates.

pairs.en: We expect that the operating profit will grow between 19% and 27% at constant exchange rates. This primarily reflects the sales growth outlook and continued investments in current and future growth drivers within research, development, and commercial. And negative mid-single-digit operating profit growth impact related to the acquisition of the three Catalent manufacturing sites is also included in the guidance. For 2025, we expect net financial items to amount to a loss of around DKK 9 billion.
pairs.zh:
我们预计，按固定汇率计算，营业利润将增长19%至27%。这主要反映了销售增长前景，以及对研发和商业化领域当前及未来增长驱动因素的持续投资。此外，与收购三个Catalent生产场地相关的营业利润增长影响为负中个位数，也已包含在此指引中。对于2025年，我们预计净财务项目亏损约为90亿丹麦克朗。

原文：We expect that the operating profit will grow between 19% and 27% at constant exchange rates. This primarily reflects the sales growth outlook and continued investments in current and future growth drivers within research, development, and commercial. And negative mid-single-digit operating profit growth impact related to the acquisition of the three Catalent manufacturing sites is also included in the guidance. For 2025, we expect net financial items to amount to a loss of around DKK 9 billion.

pairs.en: This mainly reflects losses on currencies, primarily the U.S. dollar, and increased interest expenses related to funding of the Catalent site transaction as this acquistition was mainly debt financed. The effective tax rate for 2025 is expected to be in the range of 21% to 23% and. The increase compared to 2024 is mainly driven by country and therapy sales mix.
pairs.zh:
这主要反映了货币（主要是美元）的损失，以及与收购Catalent场地交易融资相关的利息支出增加，因为此次收购主要通过债务融资。2025年的有效税率预计在21%至23%之间。与2024年相比的增长主要由国家及治疗领域销售组合驱动。

This mainly reflects losses on currencies, primarily the U.S. dollar, and increased interest expenses related to funding of the Catalent site transaction as this acquistition was mainly debt financed. The effective tax rate for 2025 is expected to be in the range of 21% to 23% and. The increase compared to 2024 is mainly driven by country and therapy sales mix.

pairs.en: Capex is expected to be around DKK 65 billion in 2025, reflecting expansion of the supply chain. In the coming years, capex to sales ratio is still expected to be in the low double digits. The free cash flow is expected to be DKK 75 million to DKK 85 billion, reflecting the sales growth, a favorable impact from rebates in the U.S. countered by increased investments in manufacturing facilities.
pairs.zh:
2025年的资本支出预计约为650亿丹麦克朗，反映出供应链的扩张。未来几年，资本支出与销售额的比率预计仍将维持在较低的两位数水平。自由现金流预计将在75亿丹麦克朗至850亿丹麦克朗之间，这反映了销售增长、美国回扣的有利影响，但被制造设施投资的增加所抵消。

原文：
Capex is expected to be around DKK 65 billion in 2025, reflecting expansion of the supply chain. In the coming years, capex to sales ratio is still expected to be in the low double digits. The free cash flow is expected to be DKK 75 million to DKK 85 billion, reflecting the sales growth, a favorable impact from rebates in the U.S. countered by increased investments in manufacturing facilities.

pairs.en: That covers the outlook for 2025.Now back to you, Lars.
pairs.zh:
这涵盖了2025年的展望。现在交还给你，Lars。

That covers the outlook for 2025.Now back to you, Lars.

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

Thank you, Karsten. Please turn to the final slide. We are pleased with the performance in 2024, where 26% sales growth reflects that more than 45 million people are now benefiting from our treatments. Further, we completed the acquisition of three Catalent sites.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Karsten。请翻到最后一页。我们对2024年的业绩感到满意，26%的销售增长反映出超过4500万人正从我们的治疗中受益。此外，我们完成了对三个Catalent场地的收购。

Thank you, Karsten. Please turn to the final slide. We are pleased with the performance in 2024, where 26% sales growth reflects that more than 45 million people are now benefiting from our treatments. Further, we completed the acquisition of three Catalent sites.

pairs.en: And during the year, we progressed our R&D pipeline, including obesity projects, such as CagriSema and amycretin. With effective 2025 outlook, we will continue to focus on strong commercial execution and the progression of our early and late-stage R&D pipeline, and on the expansion of our production capacity. With that, I would like to hand the word back to Jacob.
pairs.zh:
在这一年里，我们推进了研发管线，包括肥胖症项目，例如CagriSema和amycretin。凭借有效的2025年展望，我们将继续专注于强大的商业执行力、推进早期和晚期研发管线，以及扩大生产能力。接下来，有请Jacob发言。

And during the year, we progressed our R&D pipeline, including obesity projects, such as CagriSema and amycretin. With effective 2025 outlook, we will continue to focus on strong commercial execution and the progression of our early and late-stage R&D pipeline, and on the expansion of our production capacity. With that, I would like to hand the word back to Jacob.

pairs.en: Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations
pairs.zh:
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you, Lars. Next slide, please. With that, we are now ready for the Q&A. [Operator instructions] Operator, we are now ready to take the first question, please.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Lars。请下一张幻灯片。至此，我们准备开始问答环节。[Operator instructions] 接线员，我们准备接听第一个问题。

Thank you, Lars. Next slide, please. With that, we are now ready for the Q&A. [Operator instructions] Operator, we are now ready to take the first question, please.

pairs.en: Questions & Answers:
pairs.zh:
问题与解答：
Questions & Answers:

pairs.en: Operator
pairs.zh:
操作员

pairs.en: Thank you. [Operator instructions] And your first question comes from the line of Richard Vosser from J.P. Morgan. Please go ahead.

Hi. Thanks for taking my questions. Two questions, please. Firstly, on Wegovy, could you give us some more details of what's holding back the U.S.

pairs.en: prescriptions in the last quarter of '24 and the early part of '25? What can you do about it? And how should we anticipate the growth in prescriptions from here? prescriptions in the last quarter of '24 and the early part of '25? What can you do about it? And how should we anticipate the growth in prescriptions from here? pairs.en: David Moore--Executive Vice President, US Operations and Global Business Development
pairs.zh:
David Moore——执行副总裁，美国运营和全球业务发展  
David Moore--Executive Vice President, US Operations and Global Business Development

pairs.en: Thank you, Richard, for the question. I think it's important to remember that the total market for anti-obesity medicines grew in the U.S. last year by 160%. And so the story continues to be about market expansion for obesity.
pairs.zh:
谢谢Richard的提问。我认为需要记住的是，去年美国抗肥胖药物市场整体增长了160%。所以核心依然在于肥胖症市场的扩张。

Thank you, Richard, for the question. I think it's important to remember that the total market for anti-obesity medicines grew in the U.S. last year by 160%. And so the story continues to be about market expansion for obesity.

pairs.en: And for our own brand, Wegovy, recall, we started last year with around 100,000 prescriptions and ended with over 200,000 prescriptions. And so the scaling efforts are recognized and that's being pulled through in the market. In the beginning of the year, and this is normal, there are movements in benefit plans and patients changing in terms of their co-pays and co-insurance. This is normal, but it does have an impact with total prescriptions in the beginning of the year as well as coming through holidays, as well as Martin Luther King holiday in the beginning of the year.
pairs.zh:
至于我们自有品牌Wegovy，回顾来看，去年年初我们大约有10万张处方，到年底则超过了20万张。因此，规模化努力得到了认可，并在市场上得到体现。在年初，这是正常现象，福利计划会有所调整，患者的共付额和共同保险也会发生变化。这很正常，但确实会对年初的总处方量产生影响，此外还有假期以及年初的马丁·路德·金假日的影响。

And for our own brand, Wegovy, recall, we started last year with around 100,000 prescriptions and ended with over 200,000 prescriptions. And so the scaling efforts are recognized and that's being pulled through in the market. In the beginning of the year, and this is normal, there are movements in benefit plans and patients changing in terms of their co-pays and co-insurance. This is normal, but it does have an impact with total prescriptions in the beginning of the year as well as coming through holidays, as well as Martin Luther King holiday in the beginning of the year.

pairs.en: It's important to remember, we're treating 1.2 million patients with Wegovy today, and we have access of 55 million people living with obesity in the U.S. Driving new prescriptions is, of course, our focus. And what we can say about that is we are shipping more of the starter doses as we speak. Those started doses are making their way through the supply chain from the wholesaler to a retailer, which is also new for us to have this amount of new starter doses.
pairs.zh:
需要记住的是，我们目前正在用Wegovy治疗120万患者，而美国有5500万肥胖人群。推动新处方的开具自然是我们的重点。关于这一点，我们可以说的是，我们正在加大起始剂量的发货量。这些起始剂量正通过供应链从批发商流向零售商，对我们来说，拥有如此大量的新起始剂量也是前所未有的。

原文：
It's important to remember, we're treating 1.2 million patients with Wegovy today, and we have access of 55 million people living with obesity in the U.S. Driving new prescriptions is, of course, our focus. And what we can say about that is we are shipping more of the starter doses as we speak. Those started doses are making their way through the supply chain from the wholesaler to a retailer, which is also new for us to have this amount of new starter doses.

pairs.en: And now it's our opportunity to pull through this market expansion and connect more people with Wegovy in the U.S.
pairs.zh:
现在是我们抓住这次市场扩张的机会，让更多美国民众接触到Wegovy的时候了。

And now it's our opportunity to pull through this market expansion and connect more people with Wegovy in the U.S.

pairs.en: Yeah. Thank you very much, Richard. So REDEFINE 4, as you rightly mentioned, this had trial CagriSema versus semaglutide. The first statistical testing will be non-inferiority and based on what we've seen with REDEFINE 1, there's a good assumption that will come out with non-inferiority established.
pairs.zh:
是的，非常感谢，Richard。正如你正确提到的，REDEFINE 4试验比较了CagriSema与semaglutide。首个统计检验将是非劣效性检验，基于我们在REDEFINE 1中看到的结果，有充分的理由预期非劣效性将得以确立。

Yeah. Thank you very much, Richard. So REDEFINE 4, as you rightly mentioned, this had trial CagriSema versus semaglutide. The first statistical testing will be non-inferiority and based on what we've seen with REDEFINE 1, there's a good assumption that will come out with non-inferiority established.

pairs.en: Second test for superiority. And again, I think it's too early to speculate, but we will see the data when we will see them, but that is test number two.
pairs.zh:
第二个优越性测试。同样，我认为现在猜测还为时过早，但我们会在看到数据时看到它们，但那是第二个测试。

Second test for superiority. And again, I think it's too early to speculate, but we will see the data when we will see them, but that is test number two.

Thank you, Martin, and thank you, Richard. Then we are ready for the next set of questions, please.

pairs.en: Harry Sephton--UBS -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Harry Sephton——UBS——分析师

Harry Sephton--UBS -- Analyst

pairs.en: Hi there. Thank you for taking my questions. It's Harry Sephton from UBS. I'd like to start with the REDEFINE 1 results, and can we address this difference between the weight loss profile that doesn't show a typical dose response? You talked about the fact that fewer patients finished at the higher dose in the initial results as a potential explanation to the weaker weight loss versus your modeling, the data you've shown today somewhat contradicts this.
pairs.zh:
你好，谢谢你回答我的问题。我是瑞银的Harry Sephton。我想先从REDEFINE 1的结果开始，能否解释一下减重效果未呈现典型剂量反应这一差异？你提到初始结果中高剂量组完成人数较少，可能是其减重效果弱于模型的潜在原因，但今天展示的数据似乎与此矛盾。

原文：Hi there. Thank you for taking my questions. It's Harry Sephton from UBS. I'd like to start with the REDEFINE 1 results, and can we address this difference between the weight loss profile that doesn't show a typical dose response? You talked about the fact that fewer patients finished at the higher dose in the initial results as a potential explanation to the weaker weight loss versus your modeling, the data you've shown today somewhat contradicts this.

pairs.en: So what have you seen to explain this discrepancy? Is it a speed of titration issue? Or are there other factors you can help explain this? And what read across can you take from these data for the imminent REDEFINE 2 data? My second question is following the amycretin subcu data. How do you see the positioning of this product versus CagriSema in the future? Do we need incremental efficacy from here? Or does the benefit from amycretin more come from scalability and the flexibility of both the injectable and oral formulations? And what is the timing for the initiation of your Phase 3 program for amycretin? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
那么您观察到了什么可以解释这种差异？是剂量调整速度的问题吗？还是有其他因素可以帮助解释？对于即将公布的REDEFINE 2数据，您能从现有数据中得出哪些推论？我的第二个问题关于amycretin皮下注射数据。您如何看待未来该产品与CagriSema的定位？是否需要在此基础上有更高的疗效？还是amycretin的优势更多来自可扩展性以及注射剂和口服制剂的灵活性？另外，amycretin三期项目的启动时间是什么时候？谢谢。

So what have you seen to explain this discrepancy? Is it a speed of titration issue? Or are there other factors you can help explain this? And what read across can you take from these data for the imminent REDEFINE 2 data? My second question is following the amycretin subcu data. How do you see the positioning of this product versus CagriSema in the future? Do we need incremental efficacy from here? Or does the benefit from amycretin more come from scalability and the flexibility of both the injectable and oral formulations? And what is the timing for the initiation of your Phase 3 program for amycretin? Thank you.

pairs.en: Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations
pairs.zh:
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode——投资者关系负责人  
Jacob Martin Wiborg Rode--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Thank you, Harry, for those two questions. On the first one, in terms of REDEFINE 1 data, we'll turn it to you, Martin.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你，Harry，提出这两个问题。关于第一个，关于REDEFINE 1数据，我们把这个问题交给你，Martin。
原文：Thank you, Harry, for those two questions. On the first one, in terms of REDEFINE 1 data, we'll turn it to you, Martin.

pairs.en: Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development
pairs.zh:
Martin Holst Lange--执行副总裁，开发部门
Martin Holst Lange--Executive Vice President, Development

pairs.en: Yeah. Thank you very much, Harry. So first of all, I think it's important to call out, we don't really see discrepancies. We see a picture emerging that we've seen to an extent in the step certainly in the step-up study programs, and we see that also now in REDEFINE 1.
pairs.zh:
是的。非常感谢你，Harry。首先，我认为需要指出，我们并没有看到明显的差异。我们看到了一幅逐渐浮现的画面，这在step-up研究项目中已有一定程度的体现，现在在REDEFINE 1中也是如此。

Yeah. Thank you very much, Harry. So first of all, I think it's important to call out, we don't really see discrepancies. We see a picture emerging that we've seen to an extent in the step certainly in the step-up study programs, and we see that also now in REDEFINE 1.

pairs.en: We see a group of people who titrate with very strong safety and tolerability to the fullest dose. They have a very substantial weight loss. And specifically in REDEFINE 1, we see the potential for even further weight loss with longer treatment duration. Then we see some early responders who clearly lose weight faster than the other group.
pairs.zh:
我们看到一组患者以非常强大的安全性和耐受性逐渐增加至最高剂量，他们实现了非常显著的体重减轻。具体在REDEFINE 1试验中，我们观察到随着治疗时间延长，体重可能进一步下降。此外，我们还看到一些早期应答者，他们的体重减轻速度明显快于其他组。

原文：
We see a group of people who titrate with very strong safety and tolerability to the fullest dose. They have a very substantial weight loss. And specifically in REDEFINE 1, we see the potential for even further weight loss with longer treatment duration. Then we see some early responders who clearly lose weight faster than the other group.

pairs.en: They also appear to have the potential to lose more than the other group. And what we can see from this is basically that on average, that group which is bigger than what we've normally seen in our trials, losers actually a mean of 25.2 percentage point at the end of trial, approaching a BMI that would indicate nonobesity. That actually then plays into a dynamic because these patients have slightly more gastrointestinal side effects, they also -- some of them expressed concerns about the speed of weight loss. And therefore, they start to titrate a little bit down.
pairs.zh:
他们似乎也可能比其他组损失更多。从中我们基本可以看出，平均而言，这个比我们试验中通常所见更大的组，在试验结束时平均损失了25.2个百分点，BMI接近非肥胖标准。这实际上引发了一种动态变化，因为这些患者有稍多的胃肠道副作用，他们中有些人还对减重速度表示担忧。因此，他们开始稍微下调剂量。

They also appear to have the potential to lose more than the other group. And what we can see from this is basically that on average, that group which is bigger than what we've normally seen in our trials, losers actually a mean of 25.2 percentage point at the end of trial, approaching a BMI that would indicate nonobesity. That actually then plays into a dynamic because these patients have slightly more gastrointestinal side effects, they also -- some of them expressed concerns about the speed of weight loss. And therefore, they start to titrate a little bit down.

pairs.en: That, again, is a big potential because they can actually lose more weight. It's to your point, allowing them to do individual dose titration. -- titrate a little bit slower and then coming up to higher doses, balancing the speed of their weight loss and the gastrointestinal side effects. Obviously, this population also seems to be benefiting from an even -- or could be benefiting from an even longer trial duration.
pairs.zh:
这一点再次体现了巨大的潜力，因为他们实际上可以减轻更多体重。这与你的观点一致——让他们进行个体化剂量滴定：先以稍慢的速度滴定，然后逐步提升至更高剂量，从而平衡减重速度与胃肠道副作用。显然，这一人群似乎也能从更长的试验周期中获益——或者说未来可能从中获益。

That, again, is a big potential because they can actually lose more weight. It's to your point, allowing them to do individual dose titration. -- titrate a little bit slower and then coming up to higher doses, balancing the speed of their weight loss and the gastrointestinal side effects. Obviously, this population also seems to be benefiting from an even -- or could be benefiting from an even longer trial duration.

pairs.en: And that basically means we see two distinct groups, one being what we call early or high responders. But both groups actually showing more weight loss potential. We can utilize that in the future programs for Cagrisema, specifically starting with REDEFINE 11. But we can certainly also use those data when we designed the amycretin program using the same biology.
pairs.zh:
这基本上意味着我们看到了两个不同的群体，一个是我们所谓的早期或高响应者。但这两个群体实际上都显示出更大的减重潜力。我们可以在未来的Cagrisema项目中利用这一点，特别是从REDEFINE 11开始。当然，我们在设计基于相同生物机制的amycretin项目时，也完全可以利用这些数据。

And that basically means we see two distinct groups, one being what we call early or high responders. But both groups actually showing more weight loss potential. We can utilize that in the future programs for Cagrisema, specifically starting with REDEFINE 11. But we can certainly also use those data when we designed the amycretin program using the same biology.

谢谢，Martin。关于第二个问题，涉及amycretin、CagriSema以及产品组合，我将交由Camilla回答。

Thank you, Martin. And for the second question on amycretin, CagriSema, and having a portfolio, I'll turn it to you, Camilla.

pairs.en: Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs
pairs.zh:
Camilla Sylvest——执行副总裁，商业战略与公司事务

Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs

pairs.en: Thank you very much. Yeah. There's no doubt that with the size of the obesity market, it will be a key strength to have a broad portfolio of products like Martin shared with you in the slides just before. We believe we have a very strong portfolio that enables us to work with optionality, optionality in terms of different patient segments and different markets to address the big unmet need that there is.
pairs.zh:
非常感谢。是的。毫无疑问，鉴于肥胖市场的规模，拥有像Martin刚才在幻灯片中向大家展示的广泛产品组合将是一个关键优势。我们相信，我们拥有非常强大的产品组合，使我们能够灵活选择，针对不同的患者群体和市场，来解决这一巨大的未满足需求。

原文：Thank you very much. Yeah. There's no doubt that with the size of the obesity market, it will be a key strength to have a broad portfolio of products like Martin shared with you in the slides just before. We believe we have a very strong portfolio that enables us to work with optionality, optionality in terms of different patient segments and different markets to address the big unmet need that there is.

pairs.en: Remember, there is very few percentage points of the total population that is currently being treated. And I think historically, we've talked about sort of the people with obesity as one group. But as we expand our portfolio, we will be able to target different needs of different segments, as well as different geographies. So we have remain very confident, of course, in CagriSema and also in amycretin.
pairs.zh:
请记住，目前接受治疗的人口比例仅占总人口的极少数。从历史角度来看，我们通常将肥胖者视为一个整体群体。但随着我们的产品组合不断扩展，我们将能够针对不同细分人群的不同需求以及不同地区进行精准施策。因此，我们对CagriSema和amycretin当然仍然充满信心。

Remember, there is very few percentage points of the total population that is currently being treated. And I think historically, we've talked about sort of the people with obesity as one group. But as we expand our portfolio, we will be able to target different needs of different segments, as well as different geographies. So we have remain very confident, of course, in CagriSema and also in amycretin.

pairs.en: Mike Nedelcovych--TD Cowen -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Mike Nedelcovych -- TD Cowen -- 分析师
Mike Nedelcovych--TD Cowen -- Analyst

pairs.en: Thank you for the questions. I have two. My first is on supply. Lilly has indicated that it can boost its increase in supply by 60% in the coming months.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你的问题。我有两个问题。第一个是关于供应的。Lilly表示，在未来几个月内，它可以将供应增长提高60%。

Thank you for the questions. I have two. My first is on supply. Lilly has indicated that it can boost its increase in supply by 60% in the coming months.

pairs.en: You all have never quantified capacity, but do you feel that your efforts to boost production will be competitive with this number? This might be an oversimplification, but if we grant the prescription trends in the U.S. are largely reflective of supply rather than demand than it would seem your competitor may be ramping capacity more swiftly. Do you think that's a fair interpretation? And then my second question is on oral semaglutide 25 milligrams, which you now plan to file for weight loss in the U.S. It's notable that you are not pursuing the 50-milligram dose.
pairs.zh:
你们从未量化产能，但你们是否觉得，你们为提高产量所做的努力能与这个数字竞争？这可能过于简化，但如果我们承认美国的处方趋势很大程度上反映的是供给而非需求，那么看起来你们的竞争对手可能正在更快地增加产能。你认为这种解读合理吗？我的第二个问题是关于口服semaglutide 25 milligrams，你们现在计划在美国申请用于减肥。值得注意的是你们没有追求50-milligram剂量。

You all have never quantified capacity, but do you feel that your efforts to boost production will be competitive with this number? This might be an oversimplification, but if we grant the prescription trends in the U.S. are largely reflective of supply rather than demand than it would seem your competitor may be ramping capacity more swiftly. Do you think that's a fair interpretation? And then my second question is on oral semaglutide 25 milligrams, which you now plan to file for weight loss in the U.S. It's notable that you are not pursuing the 50-milligram dose.

pairs.en: I assume this decision was related to supply considerations, but please correct me if I'm wrong. And how should we think about the eventual launch of this offering? Just as an example, you've used the term capped as it relates to Wegovy's ex-U.S. launches. Should we also think of oral semaglutide weight loss launch as capped?
pairs.zh:
我认为这个决定与供应方面的考虑有关，但如果我理解有误请指正。我们应如何看待该产品的最终上市？举例来说，您用“受限”一词来描述Wegovy在美国以外的上市情况，那么口服semaglutide减肥药的上市是否也应视为受限？

Michael, thanks for this question. And let me start basically my answer on the slide we showed earlier on. pairs.en: So actually, we have grown faster in terms of serving more patients over the last 12 months based on IQVIA -- then I'd say as a forward-looking statement in terms of our scaling into 2025. pairs.en: So that's how we are moving forward. And why you will also see us addressing different types of products with different optionalities as we just discussed all now CagriSema, amycretin, and of course, also higher-dose Wegovy. This is all part of our opportunity to play in obesity.
